news.t: REX Shares Launches New T-REX 2x EOSE ETF, EOSU

overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long EOSE Daily Target ETF (EOSU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Eos Energy Enterprises, Inc. (NYSE: EOSE)., less fees, and expenses EOSU was launched on Jan 14, 2026 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: REX Shares Launches New T-REX 2x EOSE ETF, EOSU
data.text: MIAMI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--REX Shares is pleased to announce the launch of the T-REX 2X Long EOSE Daily Target ETF (CBOE: EOSU), a leveraged ETF providing 2x daily long exposure to EOSE Inc. This ETF pro...
